meta.title: SuperClini — Dental software with AI on WhatsApp, smile simulation & DICOM 3D
meta.description: The first dental platform with AI agent on WhatsApp, smile simulation and built-in DICOM 3D viewer. Live in 9 countries with local currency and compliance.

hero.h1Line1: Your dental practice answers on WhatsApp.
hero.sub: SuperClini is the first dental platform with an AI agent on WhatsApp, smile simulation and a built-in DICOM 3D viewer — adapted to local currency and regulation in every country.

trustStrip.title: Built to be trusted on day one

ai.title: The AI your competitor doesn't have yet.
ai.sub: We don't tell you we have AI. We show it working.

whatsapp.title: Sofía, your AI receptionist on WhatsApp
whatsapp.desc: Schedules, confirms, reschedules and answers questions 24/7 — checking real availability and creating the appointment in your calendar.

examples.user1: Hi, I'd like to book a dental cleaning
examples.bot1: Hi! Happy to help. I have availability Thursday at 9am with Dr. Carolina. Does that work?
examples.bot2: Done. Your appointment is booked. I'll send a reminder the day before.

smile.title: Instant smile simulation
smile.desc: Upload a photo and our AI generates a visual simulation of the outcome in seconds. Increases first-consultation close rate.

radiograph.title: AI radiograph analysis
radiograph.desc: Assisted detection of cavities, periapical lesions and visible pathologies. AI doesn't replace the clinician — it speeds up diagnosis.

pricing.title: Prices in your local currency. No surprises.
pricing.sub: We detect your country automatically. Switch if you prefer another region.

starter.name: Starter
starter.desc: For solo offices going digital and organizing processes.

professional.name: Professional
professional.desc: For clinics that want AI, automation and top efficiency.

enterprise.name: Enterprise
enterprise.desc: For multi-site practices with self-service and full customization.

personas.title: Chosen by practices of every size.

solo.pain: You're your own receptionist, assistant and bookkeeper.
solo.benefit: Sofía answers on WhatsApp while you work. Books on her own. Remembers on her own.
highlights: PWA: installs on phone without App Store

clinic.pain: Multiple providers, multiple ops, one cashier to reconcile.
clinic.benefit: Automatic commissions on progress. Multi-op scheduling. Unified reports.

network.pain: Every location with its own chaos. Zero consolidation.
network.benefit: Real multi-tenant platform. Super-admin consolidates sites, cost centers and permissions.

features.title: Everything your practice needs.
features.sub: No hidden add-ons. No expensive third-party integrations.

agenda.title: Multi-op scheduling
agenda.desc: Real-time availability by provider and op. Auto conflict detection.

prontuario.title: Digital EHR
prontuario.desc: FDI tooth chart, periodontal chart, immutable progress notes (HIPAA-ready / LGPD / Ley 20.584).

planos.title: Treatment plans
planos.desc: Phases, sessions, digital acceptance and automatic settlement per service.

financeiro.title: Full financial module
financeiro.desc: Receivables, installments, daily cashier, payroll settlements and reports.

memberships.title: Memberships
memberships.desc: Patient subscription plans with MRR, ARR and retention metrics.

dicom.title: DICOM 3D viewer
dicom.desc: Built-in CBCT with Cornerstone3D. Dental presets, W/L, ROI, measurements.

whatsapp.title: WhatsApp AI
whatsapp.desc: Sofía agent with function calling. Books, confirms, reschedules, answers.

laboratory.title: Lab portal
laboratory.desc: Two-way orders with external labs. No financial data for technicians.

totem.title: Self-service kiosk
totem.desc: Reception check-in + operatory panel. Digital consent signing.

totem.title: Patients serve themselves.
totem.sub: A waiting-room kiosk frees your front desk for strategic work.

identify.title: Identification
identify.desc: Patient enters their {taxId}. If not registered, we create the record in seconds.

schedule.title: Scheduling
schedule.desc: Picks provider, date and time. Confirms the appointment in a single step.

checkin.title: Check-in
checkin.desc: Confirms arrival, signs consents, joins the queue automatically.

proof.title: Built with dentists, not for them.
proof.sub: SuperClini was born from the frustration of a team that listened to dozens of clinics before writing the first line of code. Our promise: if your routine improves, ours does too.

faq.title: Questions we hear all the time.

items.q: How does the free trial work?
items.a: 14 days with full access to all features. No credit card. If you don't want to continue, simply don't enter payment details.

items.q: Can I migrate from another system?
items.a: Yes. We import patients, history and schedule from Excel, Dentrix, Dentalink, Clinicorp and others. Onboarding team assists you.

items.q: Does Sofía really book in my calendar?
items.a: Yes. Uses function calling against your real database. Checks availability, creates the appointment, respects conflicts, can reschedule or cancel.

items.q: Does AI replace the dentist for diagnosis?
items.a: No. AI assists diagnosis by pointing out visible findings. Clinical decision is always yours. Full legal audit trail is kept.
True multi-tenant with org isolation. Encryption in transit and at rest. We comply with HIPAA-ready practices, LGPD (Brazil) and GDPR (Europe).
Direct WhatsApp chat with the team. Professional plan includes business-hours support. Enterprise is 24/7 with SLA.

items.q: Does it work in my country?
items.a: SuperClini runs in 9 countries: US, Chile, Brazil, Colombia, Argentina, Mexico, Peru, Spain and Portugal. Each with local currency, compliance and language.
Yes. No contracts, no penalties, no fine print. Cancel from the panel and keep access until the end of the paid period.

ctaFinal.title: Start today. 14 days free.
ctaFinal.sub: No card. No commitment. With our team alongside you in setup.

footer.tagline: The dental platform with native AI — built for practices that want to grow without chaos.

countrySelector.title: Select your country
countrySelector.sub: Changing country adjusts currency, language and regulation shown.
